channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Live markets: Saylor speaks as bitcoin plunges to $62,000
US Bitcoin Reserve Moving Ahead at ‘Deliberate Speed’: Bessent
item.description: The Treasury chief told senators the administration is using “best practices” in implementing Trump's Bitcoin reserve order.

item.title: Moomoo expands into prediction markets through Kalshi partnership
item.description: Retail trading platform moomoo has partnered with Kalshi to offer CFTC-regulated event contracts tied to economic data, elections and major sporting events directly within its app.

item.title: The $100 Million Crypto “Looksmaxxing” Boom: How Chinese Cartel Suppliers Pivoted to the Gray-Market Peptide Ecosystem
item.description: Summary A $100 Million Shadow Economy: The on-chain gray-market peptide industry has experienced a breakout, surging past a $100 million… The post The $100 Million Crypto “Looksmaxxing” Boom: How Chinese Cartel Suppliers Pivoted to the Gra…

item.title: Russia sanctions British teenager for alleging A7A5 use in funding Ukraine war
item.description: The A7A5 stablecoin was designed to bypass sanctions imposed on Russia following its invasion of Ukraine in 2022.

item.title: Bitcoin price just tagged 200-week trend line that defined 2022 bear market
item.description: Bitcoin brought back the trend line that functioned as resistance in the 2022 bear market, with BTC price RSI approaching its lowest in six years.

item.title: FG Nexus offloads additional $17.8M Ether as losses top $100M
item.description: FG Nexus offloads another 10,000 ETH, pushing realized and paper losses above $100 million as the Ethereum treasury firm continues cutting exposure.

item.title: Polymarket users cry foul after Strategy sale market resolves to ‘no’
item.description: A Polymarket contract on whether Strategy sold Bitcoin by May 31 resolved to no after traders disputed how the sale should count.

item.title: Standard Chartered's three 'Ifs' that stand between bitcoin and a market low
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 4, 2026

item.title: Coinbase Launches Pre-IPO Perps, Starting with Elon Musk's SpaceX
item.description: Elon Musk's aerospace company SpaceX is set to IPO, with current estimations making him the world's first trillionaire on its completion.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $4.4B as outflow run extends to 13 trading days
item.description: US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $397 million in outflows on Wednesday, extending a 13-day red streak to $4.4 billion as Bitcoin has fallen about 21% since May 15.

item.title: JPMorgan warns time is running short for crypto market structure bill
item.description: The Clarity Act still faces several legislative hurdles, and disputes over stablecoin yield have emerged as a key sticking point, the bank said.

item.title: Bitcoin steadies above $60,000 while derivatives send an unambiguous warning
item.description: BTC crashed to $61,300 before recovering to $62,500 with $3 billion in liquidations over two days. Traders loaded up on $60,000 puts in anticipation of further declines.

item.title: Tom Lee’s BitMine Plans $300M Preferred Stock Sale for ETH Treasury Push
item.description: The offering would tie fixed cash dividends to a staking-heavy ETH treasury model as Strategy’s preferred stock remains under pressure.

item.title: This bitcoin metric has marked every bear market bottom, and it's just flashed again
item.description: More than half of the bitcoin in circulation is sitting on unrealized losses as the BTC price tests historically significant bear-market support levels.

item.title: It's official. MicroStrategy, $MSTR, is now facing its biggest unrealized loss in history, at -$10.8 billion. In other words, after 6 years of buying Bitcoin, the company is now down -17% on its position. By comparison, the S&P 500 is up +116% over this same timefr - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9XWDZSRVB4a3hfMEdNM2hPZVJQMUNfNGRPeEFQYTIxc3pibWxydW81M2JJRDhOVncxeHdqbGVqZUFDd2xtVVVPMmJWbDFaQVZLTHlvTWxsbGdlRldDek5Zb1owRDhKQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">It's official. MicroStrategy…

item.title: Over $600M in Bitcoin longs liquidated as BTC dips toward $60K
item.description: Many traders expect Bitcoin to stage a short-term relief bounce toward $70,000, but the broader technical setup remains bearish for BTC.

item.title: Cardano slumps under 20 cents as Hoskinson says he is 'taking a break' after warning of ecosystem failures
item.description: Hoskinson's remarks followed a string of setbacks for the ecosystem, including the cancellation of Cardano's flagship conference and the shutdown of a prominent analytics platform.

item.title: Goldman Sachs teams with Apex, Archax for tokenized real estate fund
item.description: The fund combines blockchain native issuance with established fund structures.

item.title: Polymarket says No for May, Yes for June after Strategy's recent bitcoin sale
item.description: UMA voters ruled that Strategy's June 1 disclosure counted for the June contract, even though the company said it sold bitcoin during the final week of May.

item.title: Worldcoin is overlooked bet on AI IPO wave: Maelstrom
item.description: Maelstrom predicts the WLD token will reach $5 by August, a gain of around 900% from current levels.

item.title: US House Democrats call for FTC probe into prediction markets
item.description: The lawmakers are also asking the FTC for information on whether it has plans to take investigative or enforcement action against prediction markets for possible deceptive practices.

item.title: $1.6 BILLION LIQUIDATED $1.61 Billion notional value was liquidated from the crypto market in the past 24 hours. 85% of liquidations were long positions. Stay safe traders. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFBUUEtiVjVjeEN0Q1drVFFvcndRSDJCNGJlSExLakNjbjk2bHlfSWZSSEYzMlZvX1V5SGQtMHhoN1U5RkNsVUdLR2tSbThKTnBHVXVoTXpJdVcwN2c?oc=5" target="_blank">$1.6 BILLION LIQUIDATED $1.61 Billion notio…

item.title: About 67% of banned Anthropic accounts used AI to prep for cyberattacks
item.description: AI firm Anthropic mapped a year’s worth of AI-enabled cyber threats, finding that malicious actors are quickly becoming more dangerous with AI.

item.title: Apyx's STRC collateralized stablecoin suffers a brief depeg. Protocol says its a feature, not bug
item.description: Apyx’s apxUSD stablecoin briefly slipped to 93 cents Wednesday.

item.title: BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP ETFs bleed $4.4 billion over 13 sessions, only HYPE in green
item.description: BlackRock's IBIT shed another $342 million on Wednesday as ether, solana and XRP funds joined the redemption wave, leaving Hyperliquid's HYPE products as the only major crypto ETF category still pulling in net new money.

item.title: Bitmine eyes dividend-paying preferred shares, echoing Strategy’s playbook
item.description: The move comes as Ether prices slumped to a 14-month low below $1,750 on Thursday.

item.title: Coinbase freezes $3M tied to Southeast Asia crypto fraud networks
item.description: Authorities around the world have been heavily targeting scam infrastructure this year, with joint actions involving the US, UAE, China, Austria and Albania.

item.title: Bitcoin is at the same price as two years ago, but one thing is different. The 6m–2y cohort, who joined this cycle, now holds 53% of realized cap, up from 15% two years ago. Last cycle, Bitcoin bottomed when this hit 68%. Short-term holders are evolving into lo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1ORVZNYThnZF9kOU9hNXhxdE50VjZzOWZjWVpWNVFVY0ZuOFlhaExYUU9oZnFGY2JLaGdjWENXUlVpa1NHbVdzTlk4NVlmbDN2THQyd1JTcGFJR3VIVlNPcExn?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitcoin is at the same price as tw…

item.title: CFTC follows SEC in scrapping ‘no-deny’ policy for settlements
item.description: CFTC Chairman Mike Selig says the rescission of its “no-deny” policy means it now has more flexibility when settling enforcement actions.

item.title: FG Nexus is down over $85M on its #Ethereum treasury bet! FG Nexus bought 50,770 $ETH($196M) at an average price of $3,860 in Aug–Sep 2025. Then started selling in Nov 2025, selling 36,025 $ETH($83.92M) at an average price of $2,330. Total loss: $8 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1Sbm1zUVRKUUZyRTZRdGdYLXA4dTZNX1NBNThnYTJVRHd5TU50VDd4NzNkQ1licThyNDRac24wQ0d2Rm52SnpYTG9ybzRidVR1cGJwbUhJQmhRX1UxWGY4UmNn?oc=5" target="_blank">FG Nexus is down over $85M on its …

item.title: BREAKING: A total of $1.8 billion in levered crypto positions were liquidated today. This marks the largest daily crypto liquidation since January 2026. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5uS0tPNllVQnFiaGx0SGszaVRUVjdhOW9ZT3Jkdllyckd4eUk0Z2ZWTTA1RHRDU0VmV1A2NmVESUNxTGt4bDl0NElqN1dIU3FiS2xLSXN3dVNlZmlZeWMzRWFCcXRtUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: A total of $1.8 bi…

item.title: This distribution phase feels like a massive change of hands. Bitcoin investors' average cost basis is around $53K. Historically, bear markets ended only after the price fell below the realized price. I thought that level would be hard to revisit, given institutional in - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE91aWhKamdpYXRkV3AyZm1fUFNkTzhZMXlfRXoyREYyMGFSYVZIQzNYRzFTOVdmYk9BWDNEZFNpTW5xN0s5eDZNZEtHRjhuZTlMcnppNE9kSGhUaXdHUVA4VnBR?oc=5" target="_blank">This distribution phase feels like…

item.title: Bitcoin briefly drops below $62,000 as $1.5 billion in crypto longs get wiped out
item.description: Presto Research says bitcoin's drawdowns this year have coincided with rallies in AI stocks and gold as markets scale back expectations for Fed rate cuts.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin selloff stalls as key indicator signals oversold conditions
item.description: Bitcoin rebounded to $64,000 after a sharp selloff, with the move reflecting a typical bounce from oversold conditions rather than a confirmed trend reversal.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin falls to $61,655 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9YZDF0Ty0yUFhRMUhuVjRvYXpZZHJ4U21reEEwNndMVkE3Q2tJcXd2aFZvME5RdlNzdmZjTE93Zm5yM0JZSkQ2dWJiNXJYWlhwY0ZTVE5JX0l5OG5iakZYNDRvMWJENUk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin falls to $…

item.title: Bitcoin tanks below $63,000 for the first time since February as price selloff deepens
item.description: The selloff has triggered demand for protective options plays, pushing the fear gauge higher.

item.title: JUST IN: $200,000,000,000 wiped out from the crypto market cap in the past 24 hours. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1JOVN5cVowTklQYzFQQnN1LTlWbm03bk9ydWZvY3NUcXItWU9ob1lpNF9FRURsTEhnekNkRHdUbTRJWWV4N2lDSkE1a0FVNkVralVSSW1TeGRqekJHY2dBa0lR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $200,000,000,000 wiped ou…

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin’s selloff accelerates, dropping below $63,000 for the first time since February 24th. Over $1.1 billion worth of levered crypto positions have been liquidated over the past 24 hours. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBUZnJIVnFPU3JqdktLMjVaSHV3OE80em1zY2dHbV9xM1Rkc0RHNUdxRlh1SGJwZkdtTTNJVERyRklGcUpiX0Z2cWkyZkRENzlBYnJNdng5eDJnb1hyX2toVGVFY3NWdw?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin’s selloff …

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $64,000. Bitcoin has now lost -$400 billion in market cap since May 11th. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE5Tbm55cG9xRlQ3NmtlakRHUlFWYnB3MWh0MUphRmZLSDhxdXQ3NnpJQXFLSlFmSksyWl9iWnBkaVowamQxUmFyNXRkdXFsNTdzdzg5NkE3ZFQ1RExJclJ0amZQYUJsUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls belo…

item.title: Israel’s tax authority ‘disappointed’ in voluntary crypto disclosures: Report
item.description: After expecting billions of dollars worth of crypto holdings to be reported during a voluntary disclosure period, the country's tax office said only 58 filers took advantage of the procedure.

item.title: Largest Ethereum Treasury Company Bitmine Plans 3 Million Shares of 9.50% Perpetual Preferred Stock, Proceeds May Be Used to Acquire Additional ETH Bitmine Immersion Technologies announced a proposed offering of 3 million shares of 9.50% Series - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFBja1otXy04eDE1MzI2cVIyQXhORVc2dnlwdGRDZ0Q4UGtUZWp1ZThlSG1pazhidGJRV0J0SGxwOTd4Y0dKbmc5UUtTYm1Hb3JEYW5wVW5CdGVjcDRQUEVfQjlwRQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Largest Ethereum Treasury Compan…

item.title: SpaceX targets record $75 billion IPO as bitcoin treasury and liquidity risks draw focus
item.description: SpaceX's proposed $75 billion IPO would rank among the largest ever, while its $1.29 billion bitcoin holding and the broader wave of megacap listings could reshape capital flows across crypto and technology markets.

item.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine borrows a page from Saylor's playbook to offer 9.5% yield in preferred stocks
item.description: The largest Ethereum treasury firm is taking a page from Michael Saylor's Strategy to issue preferred shares to tap new sources of funding.

item.title: Wyoming executive order to guide AI data center development
item.description: Wyoming Governor Mark Gordon signed an executive order supporting AI data center development as the state seeks to attract advanced computing and technology investment.

item.title: The Best AI Models Still Encourage 'Harmful Intimacy' With Chatbots, Study Funds
item.description: A new study finds that leading AI models often encourage emotional attachment, portray themselves as human, and fail to maintain clear boundaries.

item.title: US Treasury secretary signals progress on Bitcoin reserve, CLARITY Act
item.description: Scott Bessent said that the Treasury Department was “proceeding with all deliberate speed” on President Donald Trump’s 2025 executive order to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve and digital asset stockpile.

item.title: Revolut US bank plans stablecoins alongside FDIC-insured accounts: Report
item.description: Reuters reported that Revolut plans to integrate stablecoins into its future US bank as more fintech and crypto companies chase federal banking approvals.

item.title: Cardano Slumps to 5-Year Low Price as Charles Hoskinson Warns of 'Wave of Failures'
item.description: Founder Charles Hoskinson was brutally honest about the troubles the Cardano ecosystem could face as the market continues declining.

item.title: Price predictions 6/3: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, HYPE, DOGE, ZEC, ADA, XLM
item.description: Bitcoin is at risk of a drop below $65,000, but buyers are expected to mount a strong defense as the price nears the crucial $60,000 level.

item.title: Tether Debuts Tokenized Gold Stablecoin Visa Card That Pays Out Crypto Rewards
item.description: Holders will be able to do more with their gold, instantly spending Tether's tokenized version anywhere Visa is accepted.

item.title: AI Lawyers Are Already Better Than Law Professors at Reasoning—Say Law Professors
item.description: Researchers found professors preferred AI-generated answers over those written by their peers, raising questions about the role of AI in professional education.

item.title: Bitmine's Ethereum bet nears $9 billion loss as ether falls below $1,800
item.description: Shares of Tom Lee's Ethereum treasury firm hit their lowest level since the company's crypto pivot as ETH revisits the February lows.

item.title: Hermes Ends AI Agent Terminal Era With Release of Official Desktop App
item.description: Until now, the only way to run Hermes was through a terminal—or one of several unofficial GUIs the community had cobbled together.

item.title: Someone Just Redeemed a 15-Year-Old Physical Bitcoin, Scoring $1.78 Million in BTC
item.description: Physical Casascius coins were minted 15 years ago in the early days of Bitcoin—and the BTC held within is worth a whole lot more today.

item.title: Perplexity Wants Your Laptop to Do Part of the AI Work—So It Doesn't Have To
item.description: The company's new hybrid inference system routes AI tasks between your device and the cloud automatically. Privacy and cost savings are the pitch—and lower server bills.

item.title: Crypto PAC-supported candidates sweep US state primaries after media buys
item.description: Nearly a dozen candidates across three US states won their primaries or will advance to the November election after they were supported by $3.5 million in ads funded by crypto industry-aligned PACs.

item.title: New DeFi entrant widens field of crypto political campaign funds as elections loom
item.description: The Defend Developers PAC is aiming to contribute to lawmakers who seek to shield crypto developers from legal vulnerabilities.

item.title: Bitcoin isn't crashing because of Saylor, it's losing the momentum trade
item.description: Bitcoin's recent weakness reflects a broader rotation into AI, IPOs and other momentum trades rather than concerns about Michael Saylor's bitcoin sales, according to Charles Schwab's Jim Ferraioli.

item.title: Why Ethereum Could Tank Another 25% Before Finding a Bottom: Analysis
item.description: ETH just crashed below $2,000 and is now trading near $1,841. Prediction markets place a 71% chance on a drop to $1,500—and the charts aren't pushing back.
